steps.description: Press the F1 key in Visual Studio Code to open the command palette.
Type 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette input box at the top of the window.
Press Enter to select "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" from the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Type #text:'Launch Remote (Chrome)' into the debug configuration dropdown at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface, within the Microsoft 365 Agents project workspace.
Press Enter to select "Launch Remote (Chrome)" from the debug configuration dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Email, phone, or Skype" input field on the Microsoft sign-in page within the Chrome browser.
Enter ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}} into the 'Email, phone, or Skype' input field on the Microsoft sign-in page in Google Chrome.
Click the blue "Next" button on the Microsoft sign-in page after entering the account ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Type  ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the password input field on the Microsoft sign-in page for user  ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Click the blue "Sign in" button on the Microsoft login page after entering the password for the account  ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Click the "Yes" button on the Microsoft sign-in prompt to confirm staying signed in for account  ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Click the "Add" or "Open" button in the  app details popup within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Open" button in the pop-up dialog for the  app on the Microsoft Teams web interface.
